tools.name: analyze_token
tools.description: Full risk assessment for a token. Returns risk score (0-100), risk level, confidence, recommendation (PROCEED/REQUIRE_HUMAN_APPROVAL/BLOCK), reasoning, and flags triggered. Equivalent to GET /v1/risk/{chain}/{address}.

tools.name: contextual_risk
tools.description: Position-aware contextual risk assessment. Returns the full risk assessment plus position context: estimated slippage, effective cost, max safe position, portfolio concentration, and MEV exposure. Equivalent to POST /v1/risk/contextual.

tools.name: quick_check
tools.description: Lightweight go/no-go check for a token. Returns only risk_score, risk_level, recommendation, and cached flag. Use this when you just need a quick pass/fail without the full signal breakdown.
